# Projection

**Path:** `global_descriptor/learning/projection`

Learned global descriptors based primarily on range, spherical, BEV, or other 2D projections.

## Scope

**Include:** range-image Siamese network; BEV CNN; projection transformer

**Exclude:** raw-point-only encoder
